title: 要件定義：幽霊の存在を証明する

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I meet up with Air Shakur before
training because she has some business to attend
to.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey. I brought the data you asked for. But
seriously, why the hell did I have to bring it on a
physical drive?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Hehe. I figured you would want to
know. The truth is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe is at her parents' house! Meaning, of course,
that I've been tragically left behind, and the
flavor of loneliness is harsh indeed. In short, I
need some company.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You? Lonely? Spare me the blatant lies, will ya?
I'm outta here. You should g—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What was that sound? Did anyone else hear
it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I heard it as well. How about you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Eh, whatever. I'm ou—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh! Flutter, flutter...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What the...
Hey! You're not hidin' another one of your weird
inventions, are you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! I resent that accusation. I won't
comment on my usual activity, but I can say that
I'm completely innocent this time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: This time, huh? Well, what the hell was it, then?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I hear this sound sometimes when Cafe's around.
It's something to do with her body makeup or
something.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You can't just chalk it up to her body makeup and
leave it at that. I'd like to run some tests and
verify things. But regardless, she's not even here
today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's been gone since early this morning.
She doesn't have any classes or training today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Well, whatever. I don't have time for pointless distractions. I do have training to get t—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Somebody's coming.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that's strange. You're the only one I was
expecting today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe isn't around, and there shouldn't be many
students in the school. I wonder who would be in
the hallway?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I didn't see anyone on my way over here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Aside from Agnes Tachyon and Air Shakur using
the empty classroom, there's no real reason for
anyone to come to the school building when there
are no classes.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Considering present conditions, chances of a
complete stranger coming here are very slim.
Which means my efforts to detect the source of
the sound are failing to compile.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Logic is completely failing me. Dammit, what the
hell is going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thump!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I forgot something.
Tachyon, have you seen those coffee beans I
bought the other d—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...? Are you three okay?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh... heh-heh-heh! Well, I see! I didn't expect
you to return so soon. Isn't that shocking, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch! I was missing a damn variable from the very
start. I should've factored in the likelihood of
Cafe coming back.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My thoughts were all in disarray because of that
weird noise.
Forget this. Let's go, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Not again? Who is it this time? Hang on, I'm
gonna open the door.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clearly irritated, Air Shakur swings open the
door, but there's nobody on the other side.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I swear I heard footsteps right here!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I guess something followed me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm not buying an illogical explanation like that.
choice_data_list:
Then perhaps the easiest explanation would
be... a ghost?

Maybe it was someone stamping around far
away.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I just say I'm not interested in half-baked
conclusions that bypass logic for easy answers?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm gonna have to crack this case myself.
I'll start by ascertaining what materials the
hallway is constructed out of and measuring its
acoustic properties.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I could try asking the presence to try to walk quieter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is full of enthusiasm for her project,
and Manhattan Cafe is staring off into space.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like it'll be easy to find the cause
of this phenomenon, but if anyone has a shot at
it, it's Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, that can't be it. It would have had more of an
echo to it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose we could chalk this up as a mass
hallucination.
Or would that be too dramatic?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but wait. If that's the case, do I have to reevaluate
all of our mental stats? They may be lower than I
thought...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, we should be able to make up for it with training.
I've gotta verify the external factors to arrive at an
accurate value.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I could try asking the presence to try to walk quieter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur regains her composure while
Manhattan Cafe stares off into space.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I just hope that Air Shakur's reasoning holds up.
It's been a fairly frightening experience.
